payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Beige tapered fabric lampshade on a turned dark bronze/wooden base, producing a warm yellow glow; left side of the shade is slightly edge-cropped and the lamp appears tabletop-sized, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
